reviews.review_title: Museum where you can pick things up
reviews.review_description: There are lots of interesting sculptures to examine. It's extremely good for a free app. The resolution isn't great. I wish it had 3d photos or a 3d video turnaround of the objects so I could see details. Or 3d photos of the objects' original context. This is a good app for vr beginners.
Lot's of brown objects, and such, from the Before Times.
